title: PolicyAgentVerdict
description: Structured output of the Policy Agent. Three-state gate decision plus the findings that justify it. Consumed downstream by the (out-of-scope) data massager.

verdict.description: ALLOW = no proprietary data, forward to cloud. BLOCK = proprietary data found, hand findings to massager. ESCALATE = uncertain/unknown, route to human review.

matched_case.description: The use-case the classifier routed to. 'unknown' forces ESCALATE.

classification_confidence.description: Stage-1 router confidence in matched_case. Below the configured threshold forces ESCALATE.

matched_policy_rules.description: IDs of the policy rules that fired (e.g. OT-3, HC-1). Empty for ALLOW.

findings.description: One entry per piece of proprietary data detected. Empty for ALLOW.

location.description: Where it was found: field name, file path, line, or a short verbatim snippet.

rationale.description: Why this is proprietary under the matched policy.

redaction_hint.description: Courtesy hint to the downstream data massager. mask=replace with token, drop=remove entirely, generalize=coarsen (e.g. exact date -> month).

explanation.description: Short human-readable summary of the decision.
